channel.title: Lecture Notes on MIT OpenCourseWare
channel.description: Recent content in Lecture Notes on MIT OpenCourseWare

item.title: Lecture Notes
item.description:
The lecture notes were taken by a student in the class. For all of the lecture notes, including a table of contents, download the following file (PDF - 1.6 MB).

Lec # Topics
1 Metric Spaces, Continuity, Limit Points (PDF)
2 Compactness, Connectedness (PDF)
3 Differentiation in n Dimensions (PDF)
4 Conditions for Differentiability, Mean Value Theorem (PDF)
5 Chain Rule, Mean-value Theorem in n Dimensions (PDF)

item.title: lecture1.pdf
item.description: This resource provides information regarding review of topology metric spaces, open and closed sets, continuity and limit points and closure.

item.title: lecture10.pdf
item.description: This resource provides information regarding fubini theorem and properties of riemann integrals

item.title: lecture11.pdf
item.description: This resource provides information regarding riemann integral and integration over more general regions.

item.title: lecture12.pdf
item.description: This resource provides information regarding improper integrals along with some definitions, remarks and corollary.

item.title: lecture13.pdf
item.description: This resource provides information regarding exhaustions along with some definitions, remarks and corollary.

item.title: lecture14.pdf
item.description: This resource provides information regarding support?and?compact?support and partitions?of?Unity along with the definitions.

item.title: lecture15.pdf
item.description: This resource provides information regarding partition of unity theorem along with some definitions, remarks and corollary.

item.title: lecture16.pdf
item.description: This resource provides information regarding multilinear?algebra, review of linear algebra and topology and dual space.

item.title: lecture17.pdf
item.description: This resource provides information regarding theory of tensors, pullback operators, alternating tensors along with some definitions, remarks and proofs.

item.title: lecture18.pdf
item.description: This resource provides information regarding a quick review of permutations along with some definitions, remarks and corollary.

item.title: lecture19.pdf
item.description: This resource discusses the topic wedge product in detail.

item.title: lecture2.pdf
item.description: This resource provides information regarding compactness and connectedness.

item.title: lecture20.pdf
item.description: This resource explains the topics: determinant, orientations of vector spaces.

item.title: lecture21.pdf
item.description: This resource explains the topics: tangent spaces and k-forms, the d operator.

item.title: lecture22.pdf
item.description: This resource explains the topics: The d operator, pullback operator on exterior forms.

item.title: lecture23.pdf
item.description: This resource explains the topics: integration with differential forms, change of variables theorem, Sard’s theorem.

item.title: lecture24.pdf
item.description: This resource explains Poincare theorem.

item.title: lecture25.pdf
item.description: This resource explains the generalization of Poincare lemma.

item.title: lecture26.pdf
item.description: This resource explains the topics: proper maps and degree.

item.title: lecture27.pdf
item.description: This resource explains the topics: proper maps and degree.

item.title: lecture28.pdf
item.description: This resource explains the topics: regular values, degree formula.

item.title: lecture29.pdf
item.description: This resource explains the topic topological invariance of degree.

item.title: lecture3.pdf
item.description: This resource provides information regarding differentiation.

item.title: lecture30.pdf
item.description: This resource explains the topics: Canonical submersion and immersion theorems, definition of manifold.

item.title: lecture31.pdf
item.description: This resource gives some examples of manifolds to better explain the topic.

item.title: lecture32.pdf
item.description: This resource explains the topic tangent spaces of manifolds.

item.title: lecture33.pdf
item.description: This resource explains the topic differential forms on manifolds.

item.title: lecture34.pdf
item.description: This resource explains the topic orientations of manifolds.

item.title: lecture35.pdf
item.description: This resource explains the topics: Integration on manifolds, degree on manifolds.

item.title: lecture36.pdf
item.description: This resource explains the topics: Degree on manifolds, Hopf theorem.

item.title: lecture37.pdf
item.description: This resource explains the topic integration on smooth domains.

item.title: lecture38.pdf
item.description: This resource explains the topics: Integration on smooth domains, Stokes’ theorem.

item.title: lecture4.pdf
item.description: This resource provides information regarding conditions for differentiability.

item.title: lecture5.pdf
item.description: This resource provides information regarding chain rule, the mean-value theorem inn dimensions and inverse function theorem.

item.title: lecture6.pdf
item.description: This resource provides information regarding inverse function theorem and 4 lemmas.

item.title: lecture7.pdf
item.description: This resource provides information regarding discussion of inverse function theorem and integration.

item.title: lecture8.pdf
item.description: This resource provides information regarding riemann integral of several variables.

item.title: lecture9.pdf
item.description: This resource provides information regarding discusses few theorems, corollary proofs, and lemmas

item.title: lectures.pdf
item.description: This resource contains a table of content of the lecture topics covered in the class e.g. review of topology, differentiation, integration, multi-linear algebra, integration with differential forms, and manifolds. It also covers these topics in detail.
